/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_robot_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/my_robot_msgs/libmy_robot_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/my_robot_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/my_robot_msgs/msg/_can_frame_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/duybuntu/carrierbot_ws/build/my_robot_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libmy_robot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libmy_robot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
